description_long: This object is a medium-sized, irregularly shaped rock partially embedded in a patch of dark, rough ground. The rock itself is tan with lighter streaks and appears to be partially exposed, with the majority of its mass surrounded by a dark, asphalt-like surface. The surface around the rock is uneven, with visible cracks and a granular texture, suggesting it may be part of a worn urban pavement or roadside. The rock protrudes from the center, with its rough, jagged edges contrasting against the smoother, flatter surrounding material. There are no visible markings, graffiti, or signs of artificial modification on the rock. The overall appearance suggests it serves as a natural obstacle or barrier within an urban environment.
description: A tan, streaked rock partially embedded in rough, dark pavement, protruding as a natural obstacle with jagged edges.
description_view_0: The rock is centrally visible, surrounded by a wide expanse of dark, rough ground with a clear depression around it.
description_view_1: The rock is mostly obscured, with the dark, uneven surface dominating the view and only a small portion of the rock visible.
description_view_2: The tan rock is most prominent, jutting out from the dark surface, highlighting its irregular shape and rough texture.
description_view_3: The rock is partially visible through an opening in the dark surface, with the surrounding area sloping away from the center.
